NEWS BJJ ARTICLES SHOP CONTACT CONTRIBUTE AN ARTICLE PRIVACY POLICY HomeArticlesBJJ News(WATCH) Izaak Michell Confronted On Live TV Amid Arrest Warrant (WATCH) Izaak Michell Confronted On Live TV Amid Arrest Warrant APR 07, 2026BJJEE1 AdminArticles, BJJ News Izaak Michell has been thrust back into the spotlight – this time after being confronted by an Australian news crew regarding the serious allegations against him and an arrest warrant issued in the United States. Just months ago, Michell was widely regarded as one of the top competitors in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu. However, that narrative changed abruptly when Kingsway Jiu-Jitsu announced his removal from the team shortly before Christmas. The situation escalated when Hannah Griffith publicly accused Michell of sexual assault. Soon after, another woman came forward with similar allegations. Those claims echoed earlier statements from Nicky Ryan, who had said that multiple women had reported Michell to authorities. An arrest warrant was subsequently issued in Hays County, Texas, but Michell has not been taken into custody. Reports indicate that this is because he has remained outside U.S. jurisdiction. Michell has reportedly been in Australia, his home country, where extradition in this case appears unlikely. That’s where 10 News entered the story. Journalist Samantha Butler tracked Michell down in the Gold Coast region of Queensland and attempted to question him on camera. According to the report, Michell was approached while inside a van he was allegedly living in. When confronted, he did not respond to any questions and instead closed the door. Shortly afterward, a woman arrived and drove the van away, ending the encounter. Sloth Jiu-Jitsu: The Ultimate Guide for Calmly Beating Bigger, Younger Opponents 💥 What if slowing down was the fastest way to win? 💭 Tired of Getting Smashed by Younger, Stronger Grapplers? It’s not your age. It’s your strategy. If you’re a passionate grappler over 35 who’s sick of getting outpaced, outmuscled, or out-cardio’d by opponents half your age — this 120 page e-book was made for you. 🔓 Unlock the Power of Sloth Jiu-Jitsu: Build Sustainable Strength—Without Wrecking Your Joints, Energy, or Jiu-Jitsu Tired of waking up sore and burnt out after lifting? Sloth Strength is a proven blueprint for grapplers over 35 who want to get stronger—without the pain, burnout, or injuries.
